title: Favorite Eva Quotes
wikitext:
[]: Favorite Eva Quotes             Quote Post by Genocide » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:02 pm "The fate of destruction is also the joy of rebirth"

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:17 pm My favorite? Rei's poetic verse when she is doing those compatability tests with unit 01: Mountains, heavy are the mountains but that changes, with the passage of time. Sky, blue sky what your eye can't see, what your eye can see the sun, one, only one. Water, it is agreeable. Commander Ikari? Flowers, so many the same, so many without purpose. Sky, sky of red red the color, the color I hate. The liquid flows, it drips, ripples and pours. Blood, the scent of blood from the woman who does not bleed. From the red soil, the humans come humans made by man and woman. City, a human creation. Eva, a human creation as well. What are humans? Are they creations of god? Humans, created by that which is human. This is that which is life. My life, my heart I am a vessel for my thoughts. they entry plug, the throne of the soul. Who is this? This is me. Who am I? What am I? What am I? I am I. This object that is, is myself that which forms is me. This is myself that can be seen, yet this is not the that which is myself. A strange feeling my body feels as if it is melting. I can no longer see myself my form, my shape, it fades from view. Awareness dawns of someone who is not me who is here, there? Beyond me here. Shinji? This person I know, Major Katsuragi? Doctor Akagi? People, my classmates the pilot of unit 2 Commander Ikari? Who are you? Who are you? Who are you?

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:40 pm If you were to bridge the gap between man and God, what would you find? more importantly, what would you be? not canon, but awesome none the less

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:45 pm "Death can not give birth to anything." -Gendou (If you can't find the exact quote this place has the scripts for EoE, just scroll to the bottom of the page to find the script for Episode 26 of the movie. Also I think the character pages there have quotes too.) [url]http://mywebpages.comcast.net/juzzam1/NGEEoEScript25.htm[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Jul 08, 2004 5:24 pm "MOVE! MOVE! MOVE YOU GODDAMN FILTHY MONSTER!!!:"- Shinji during the 14th angel fight, awsome quote but my favorite is "Shinji no Baka!" As if who said this one isn't obvious....

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:21 pm Probly gendo screaming " Rei ! " in EoE he just sounds so defeated

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:24 pm He who overcomes will be dressed in white; and i shall not take his name from the book of life; and i give witness to his name before my Father, and before his angels...

[]: Re: Favorite Eva Qutoes             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:30 pm Genocide wrote: "The fate of destruction is also the joy of rebirth"

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Jul 08, 2004 7:18 pm another favorite and great quote: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! -Shinji Ikari

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Jul 08, 2004 7:21 pm TheMessiah wrote: He who overcomes will be dressed in white; and i shall not take his name from the book of life; and i give witness to his name before my Father, and before his angels...

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Thu Jul 08, 2004 8:00 pm EVA-01X wrote: TheMessiah wrote: He who overcomes will be dressed in white; and i shall not take his name from the book of life; and i give witness to his name before my Father, and before his angels...

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Fri Jul 09, 2004 12:32 am My favorite quotes are these from the End of Evangelion: ----------- Shinji: Nobody understands me. Rei: You didn't understand anything. Shinji: I thought it was supposed to be a world without unpleasantness... without uncertainty Rei: Because you thought that everyone else was like you. Shinji: Betrayed! You've betrayed my feelings!! Rei: You've misunderstood from the start. You simply assumed without asking. Shinji: Nobody wants me. So, everybody just die. Rei: Then, what are those hands for? Shinji: Nobody cares whether I exist or not... Nothing will change. So, everybody just die. Rei: Then, what is that heart for? Shinji: It'd be better if I wasn't here either. So I should just die, too. Rei: Then, why are you here? (Shinji as a child, crying with a large travel bag next to him) Shinji: Is it okay for me to be here? (Screen text: "Silence" - Fades out) Shinji (screaming): NOOOOOOOOOOO!! ----------- Rei(s): The world is overflowing with sadness. People are surrounded by emptiness... And loneliness has filled their hearts. ----------- Shinji (voice): Then... where is my dream? Rei (voice): It is the continuation of reality. Shinji (voice): Where is... my reality? Rei (voice): It is at the end of your dream. ----------- Rei: This is the sea of LCL... The primordial soup of life. A world without AT Fields... without your own shape. An ambiguous world where it is impossible to tell where you end and other people start. A fragile world where you exist everywhere, and thus exist nowhere. ----------- Source: EvaOtaku.com

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Fri Jul 09, 2004 3:38 am One of the first lines of EOE: "I'm so #!@$%^ up." - Shinji Ikari The last line of EOE: "How disgusting." - Asuka Langley Also, "If I can see you again, I'll say the words I couldn't say to you eight years ago....bye. :cry: " - Ryoji Kaji I love those lines that display some innermost thought in the characters. That last line may be my favorite. If you love someone tell them!

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Fri Jul 09, 2004 6:41 am Almost all of the lines that come out of episode 26 would make great quotes.

[]:             Quote Post by Vulkurt » Fri Jul 09, 2004 8:24 am Kozo Fuyutsuki: It's hot. Gendo Ikari: ...yes...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Fri Jul 09, 2004 10:30 am Great line there. Heres a good fanfic quote Rei- "I am the Pumpkin Queen!!" Shinji the Cassonova I belive... but as for a real one: Misato: YEEEEEEEEEEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!! Thats the way to start your morning!! Shinji: *Gives her an interesting look* Misato: Whats with that look? Don't you know that the traditional Japanese breakfast is grilled fish, steamed rice and a little sake? Shinji: Your tradition maybe... Misato: Are you saying that I'm lazy? Shinji: And sloppy too.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 09, 2004 11:04 am Thank you, my father. Good bye, my mother. And to the all the children, Congratulations! -Shinji Ikari That one always makes me happy, and fills me with hope :)

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Fri Jul 09, 2004 11:08 am When I said get up I didn't mean get that up!-Asuka during AU in Episode 26 What!!?? Are you riding his bologa pony or somthing!? Rei during the same scene

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Fri Jul 09, 2004 2:24 pm RubberSoul wrote: My favorite quotes are these from the End of Evangelion: ----------- Shinji: Nobody understands me. Rei: You didn't understand anything. Shinji: I thought it was supposed to be a world without unpleasantness... without uncertainty Rei: Because you thought that everyone else was like you. Shinji: Betrayed! You've betrayed my feelings!! Rei: You've misunderstood from the start. You simply assumed without asking. Shinji: Nobody wants me. So, everybody just die. Rei: Then, what are those hands for? Shinji: Nobody cares whether I exist or not... Nothing will change. So, everybody just die. Rei: Then, what is that heart for? Shinji: It'd be better if I wasn't here either. So I should just die, too. Rei: Then, why are you here? (Shinji as a child, crying with a large travel bag next to him) Shinji: Is it okay for me to be here? (Screen text: "Silence" - Fades out) Shinji (screaming): NOOOOOOOOOOO!! ----------- Rei(s): The world is overflowing with sadness. People are surrounded by emptiness... And loneliness has filled their hearts. ----------- Shinji (voice): Then... where is my dream? Rei (voice): It is the continuation of reality. Shinji (voice): Where is... my reality? Rei (voice): It is at the end of your dream. ----------- Rei: This is the sea of LCL... The primordial soup of life. A world without AT Fields... without your own shape. An ambiguous world where it is impossible to tell where you end and other people start. A fragile world where you exist everywhere, and thus exist nowhere. ----------- Source: EvaOtaku.com

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Fri Jul 09, 2004 4:41 pm Too add on to Phaze, I think you need to finish the quote to feel the full affect, "God is in his heaven. All's right with the world." I don't mean to steal your quote but I just think you need the entire quote to ge the picture sometimes unless your trying to show another one.

From the red soil, the humans come humans made by man and woman. City, a human creation. Eva, a human creation as well. What are humans? Are they creations of god? Humans, created by that which is human. This is that which is life. My life, my heart I am a vessel for my thoughts. they entry plug, the throne of the soul. Who is this? This is me. Who am I? What am I? What am I? I am I. This object that is, is myself that which forms is me. This is myself that can be seen, yet this is not the that which is myself. A strange feeling my body feels as if it is melting. I can no longer see myself my form, my shape, it fades from view. Awareness dawns of someone who is not me who is here, there? Beyond me here. Shinji? This person I know, Major Katsuragi? Doctor Akagi? People, my classmates the pilot of unit 2 Commander Ikari? Who are you? Who are you? Who are you?
